title: Repealed by Acts 2018, No. 569, §2, eff. July 1, 2021.

§1809. Repealed by Acts 2018, No. 569, §2, eff. July 1, 2021.

            Added by Acts 1980, No. 257, §1, eff. July 12, 1980; Acts 2018, No. 569, §2, eff. July 1, 2021.
